title: armeria maritima subsp. pinifolia
intro: Armeria maritima subsp. pinifolia, commonly known as dwarf sea thrift, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae, characterized by its compact growth habit and delicate white or pink flowers. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Armeria maritima subsp. pinifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusing the flowers in hot water to make a tea or using them in tinctures and salves to harness their medicinal properties.
